skills.name: Rune of Destruction
skills.description: Inflicts powerful damage to enemies in a targeted area.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Casting Time: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Rune of Earth
skills.description: Summons stones from the ground to damage enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 8
Casting Time: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Rune of Repulsion
skills.description: Continuously fires Psychokinesis property sphere to the front while casting
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % per 0.2 seconds
Channeling Duration: 2 seconds

skills.name: Rune of Justice
skills.description: Charges a Non-property magic attack in a straight line to the front.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
Casting Time: CaptionTime seconds
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Rune of Protection
skills.description: Applies an effect that reduces the damage you receive while casting skills.
skills.effect_text:
Reduce damage received while casting CaptionRatio %
Duration CaptionRatio2 Minutes
Casting Time CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Rune of Rock
skills.description: Send five giant rocks falling from the sky to deal damage down below.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Casting Time: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Rune of Gravity
skills.description: Pulls the Psychokinesis property sphere and spins around the character at a fast speed
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Target: CaptionRatio2
Casting Time: CaptionTime seconds
Sphere Duration: 5 seconds

skills.name: Rune of Beginning
skills.effect_text: Increases final damage of Rune Caster by CaptionRatio %

attributes.name: Rune Caster: Skilled Casting
attributes.description:
* Applies [Rune Caster: Casting] after using any Rune Caster's casting skill

* One stack of [Rune Caster: Casting] changes the casting speed of Rune Caster skills to 1 second

* Two stacks of [Rune Caster: Casting] change the casting speed of Rune Caster skills to 0.5 seconds

* [Rune Caster: Casting] Duration: [5 seconds + 0.25 seconds per attribute level]

attributes.name: Rune of Destruction: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Rune of Destruction] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rune of Justice: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Rune of Justice] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rune of Earth: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Rune of Earth] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rune of Protection: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Rune of Protection]'s damage reducing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rune of Rock: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Rune of Rock] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Cloth Mastery: Enchant Rune of Destruction
attributes.description:
* While equipped with 4 pieces of [Cloth] armor, you gain the [Rune Enchant: Destruction] buff

* The [Rune Enchant: Destruction] buff increases critical strike chance, physical damage, and magic damage

- Critical Chance Increase: 15%

- Damage Increase: 10%

attributes.name: [Arts] Rune of Destruction: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Rune of Destruction] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Rune of Justice: Judgement
attributes.description:
* Changed to channeling skill that strikes the enemy in front every 0.2 seconds in maximum of 2 seconds in place

* Changes Overheat to 1 time

attributes.name: Rune Friendly
attributes.description: * Damage increases by 40% when the property of the attack is Non, Psychokinesis, or Earth and the weapon equipped is staff or rod

attributes.name: Rune of Protection: Giant
attributes.description:
* Turn yourself or a selected party member into a giant for a moment, instead of the original effect

* Applies buff that increases Defense and CON by 20% and Movement Speed by 20 for [skill level * 60] seconds to the caster to the party member

* Only Rune Caster skills can be used
